text.tspan: Seven economies · eleven structural metrics · bar lengths show relative position within each column
INDIA SEMICONDUCTOR INTELLIGENCE 2026 · WHO REALLY BENEFITS FROM INDIA'S FAB ECOSYSTEM?
India 2026 vs Taiwan 2025: capacity 1/43rd · engineer density 1/22nd · bridging requires 35-pp shift across all columns by 2035
For inverse metrics (electricity, water, build-time, SAIDI) longer bars = better position
